West Ham United’s Declan Rice also remains a target, although Chelsea are likely to have to sell players before attempting to test the the fellow London side's resolve over keeping their star man.

Rice will not push for a move away from West Ham, but the England international would be keen on a return to Chelsea where he played in the academy with Mason Mount.
